C:\msys64\ucrt64\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\FinalGame.dir/objects.a
C:\msys64\ucrt64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\FinalGame.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\FinalGame.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\msys64\ucrt64\bin\c++.exe -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\FinalGame.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o "C:\Users\daksh\Desktop\final game\FinalGame.exe" -Wl,--out-implib,libFinalGame.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\FinalGame.dir\linkLibs.rsp
